title: Star Rating
description:
Build an interactive **Star Rating** component.

### Requirements

- Render a row of clickable star buttons (default: 5 stars)
- All stars start **unfilled** (rating = 0)
- Clicking star N sets the rating to N — stars 1 through N become **filled**
- Clicking the **same star** again resets the rating to 0 (deselect)
- Support a `maxStars` prop to control how many stars render
- Support an `onChange` callback that receives the new rating number
- Filled stars must have the CSS class `star-rating__star--filled`
- Display the current rating as text: `"{rating} / {maxStars}"`

### Test IDs

| Element | data-testid |
|---------|-------------|
| Star button N | `star-{N}` (1-indexed) |
| Rating display | `rating-value` |
constraints:
- Use React functional components with hooks
- Do not use any external icon libraries — the ★ character is pre-styled for you
- Stars must be `<button>` elements for accessibility
hints: Use useState to track the selected rating (0 means no selection).
Map over Array.from({ length: maxStars }) to render the correct number of stars.
Compare each star's index+1 to the current rating to decide whether it should be filled.
